prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年综合类最低位次分别为4141→4349→3665→3920→5269，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年较2024年后移约1349名，降幅明显，基准位次约5269名；2021–2023年计划均为9人，2024–2025年缩减至8人；2026年计划增至11人，较2025年扩招3人（增幅37.5%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争压力有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 江南大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第65名稳步上升至2026年第52名，学校综合实力和声誉持续提升；2023年高考周 期内曾出现1条偏负面管理事件，但2026年周期内无显著声誉事件；抖音热度总排名第71位（评价一般），短视频曝光量中等；2021–2025年均无投档线断档或暴跌记录，报考心理 较为平稳；轻工技术与工程（A+）、食品科学与工程（A+）为全国顶尖学科，在食品、轻工领域具有极强竞争力，对相关专业报考有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学、汉语言文学等文科类专业社会热度偏热至推荐；环境科学属生化环材大类，热度一般观望；信息与计算科学属数学统计类，热度推荐；海南省2026年考生总数约7800 0人，较2025年67408人增加约10600人（增幅约15.7%），竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年计划扩 招37.5%的缓解效应、海南省考生总数增加约15.7%带来的竞争加剧、以及学校排名持续上升的吸引力增强，扩招与考生增加两因素对冲后，预计2026年位次。预测最低位次约6375名，区间5875–6875名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约6375名，区间5875–6875名。位次在区间下限（5875名）以内可重点冲刺一档法学、汉语言文学等热门文科专业；位次在区间中部（约6375名）建议以二档信息与计算 科学为主攻方向；位次在区间上限（6875名）附近建议以三档环境科学为保底选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive category were 4141 → 4349 → 3665 → 3920 → 5269, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, the ranking moved back by about 1349 places compared to 2024, with a significant decline, and the baseline ranking is about 5269. The enrollment plan was 9 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 8 students from 2024 to 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 11 students, an expansion of 3 students (37.5% increase) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competitive pressure to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jiangnan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has steadily risen from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, indicating continuous improvement in overall strength and reputation. During the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, there was one negative management incident, but no significant reputation events occurred in the 2026 cycle. Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 71st (average evaluation), with moderate short video exposure. From 2021 to 2025, there were no records of cutoff score drops or crashes, indicating relatively stable application psychology. Light Industry Technology and Engineering (A+) and Food Science and Engineering (A+) are top national disciplines, with strong competitiveness in the food and light industry fields, attracting applicants for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature have high social popularity, ranging from hot to recommended. Environmental Science belongs to the biology, chemistry, environment, and materials category, with average popularity and a wait-and-see attitude. Information and Computing Science belongs to the mathematics and statistics category, with recommended popularity. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Hainan Province is about 78,000, an increase of about 10,600 (approximately 15.7% increase) compared to 67,408 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend of rankings in 2025, the mitigating effect of a 37.5% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to a 15.7% increase in the total number of examinees in Hainan Province, and the enhanced attractiveness from the university's rising ranking, the two factors of expansion and increased examinees offset each other. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 6375, with a range of 5875 to 6875.

- English

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 6375, with a range of 5875 to 6875. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (5875) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 6375) are advised to target Tier 2 Information and Computing Science as the main direction. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (6875) are advised to choose Tier 3 Environmental Science as a safe option.
